# Comp Project - AI Assistant Instructions

This file contains code style guidelines for AI assistants working on the Comp project.
Both GitHub Copilot and Claude Code reference these instructions.

## Code Style Rules

See the `design/python-style.md` and `design/comp-style.md` files for detailed style guides for Python and Comp code, respectively.

## Running Tools

- Most functionality is through the current `comp` monolithic cli tool.
- Use `uv run comp` to run most operations and executions
  - `uv run comp example.cap --eval`
